PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad (Administrator) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Melbostad stated that he spoke with Loni Reed (Genealogical Researcher) on Friday, that in reference to the term "someone reportedly died", Mr. Reed stated that some records indicate that the subject died, but it is far less evidence than a certified death certificate. Mr. Melbostad also stated that Mati Rosenwald was an heir, that none of the people knew Paul Newton, that it is pointless to provide notice, that Mr. Newton left a will and that notice was provided to all of the others for whom they have addresses. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexes (subject to review of the order). The Court verified that Mr. Melbostad is representing himself and informed him to not include his firm's name on his pleadings.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Continued To Jan-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad in Propria Persona.

The Court asked for an update on the heir search. Mr. Melbostad reported that he spoke with the researcher, that they need 60-90 more days, that there are potential heirs in several countries in Europe, that they speak many languages and that it is all being done by regular mail, that they are concerned regarding the vacant house, that the real estate agent has been checking on it, that the law firm is paying the utility bills, that they request either general powers or specific powers to access the Chase accounts to be able to pay the bills and that he has applied for a bond to cover the cash which is around $225,000.00. The Court stated that it will take the latter request under submission, that it will grant the special letters and continued the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration to January 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Continued To Aug-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Continued To Jul-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it is considering requesting that a genealogical firm be used to search for heirs. Mr. Melbostad reported that they made a diligent search in an effort to find evidence of heirs, that they were informed by the best friend of the decedent as well as the caregiver that the decedent said that he and his brother came here from Germany and that they had no other relatives, that they searched his office and did not find anything indicating additional relatives and that the Medical Examiner's office did a search as well. The Court stated that given the size of the estate it would be appropriate to hire a genealogical firm to conduct a search. The petition for letters of administration was continued to July 18, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
